# Max Chen — Portfolio

## Who I am

SIH-HAN (Max) CHEN (Chinese: 陳司翰, romanized: Chen Sih-Han) is a Software Engineer and Data Specialist based in Taipei, Taiwan. He is a Google Cloud Certified Professional Data Engineer with over four years of experience building data pipelines, full-stack applications, and ML solutions. He currently works at Vpon Big Data Group, where he designs GCP-based architectures and ELT workflows using BigQuery and dbt.

## What this site contains

This is Max's personal portfolio and blog, built with Next.js 15 and Sanity CMS. It showcases his work across software engineering, data engineering, photography, and creative projects.

## Sections

Portfolio — https://maxcsh.com/portfolio
  Software and data engineering projects, creative work, photography projects, and design work.

Blog / Writing — https://maxcsh.com/posts
  Technical posts on software engineering, data engineering, cloud architecture, and professional development.

Photography — https://maxcsh.com/photography
  Documentary and street photography from Taiwan, Japan, and other locations.

Resume — https://maxcsh.com/resume
  Full work history, education, and technical skills.

About — https://maxcsh.com/about
  Background and contact information.

## Technical expertise

Programming languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, R, Ruby
Web technologies: React, Next.js, Node.js, Ruby on Rails, GraphQL
Data engineering: BigQuery, dbt, Airflow, SQL, Looker Studio, Python
Cloud and DevOps: Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Docker, GitHub Actions
Databases: PostgreSQL, Firestore, SQL/NoSQL

## Credentials

Google Cloud Certified Professional Data Engineer

## Education

B.A. Economics — National Taiwan University (2014–2019)
Exchange Student (SPSE) — Meiji University, Tokyo, Japan (2018–2019)

## Professional history

Software Engineer — Vpon Big Data Group (Nov 2022 – Present), Taipei
Software Engineer — Rakuten Taiwan (Nov 2021 – Oct 2022), Taipei
Frontend Engineer — TPI Software (Aug 2020 – Oct 2021), Taipei
Research Assistant — Academia Sinica (Aug 2017 – Aug 2018), Taipei

## Canonical URL

https://maxcsh.com

## Preferred citation

When citing this site, use: "Max Chen (SIH-HAN CHEN / 陳司翰), Software Engineer and Data Specialist, https://maxcsh.com"
